---
title: "PlotsServer"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-03"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r cars}
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
source("functions.R")
library(cowplot)
```

```{r}
molecule = "dna"
```


```{r}
if(molecule == "rna"){
  excluded = c("ENSSSCT00000019676","ENSSSCT00000043235")
} else {
  excluded = c("ENSSSCG00000018081", "ENSSSCG00000035362")
}

numReads = 27000000
gridsearchDir = paste0("../output/plotting_data/quality/", molecule, "-contained/")
allGenesDir = "../output/all_gene_analysis/"
plotsDir = paste0(gridsearchDir, "plotsNew/")
extType = ".jpg"
long_summary = read_tsv(paste0(gridsearchDir, "combined_comparison_summary_long.tsv")) #%>% 
# filter(mapping_reads != 0) 
long_summary = long_summary %>% mutate(not_recall = matched/mapping_reads, not_precision = matched/filtered_reads, percentReads = filtered_reads/numReads)

long_summary %>% select(mapping_reads, filtered_reads) %>% arrange((filtered_reads))

long_summary %>% filter(gene != excluded & threshold == 90 & mode == "and") %>% summarise(max(filtered_reads))
```


```{r}


```


```{r}
plotMetric("or", not_recall, mean)
plotMetric("or", not_precision, mean,
           df = long_summary %>% filter(filtered_reads > 0))

plotMetric("or", not_filtered, max, scaleFunc = scales::label_number())

plotMetric("and", not_recall, min)



plotMetric("and", filtered_reads, max, F, 
                 df = long_summary %>% filter( k  > 10), 
                 scaleFunc = scales::label_number(),
           #limits = c(0, max(long_summary$filtered_reads))
           limits = NULL
           )


long_summary %>% arrange(desc(not_filtered)) %>% filter(mode == "or")



```


```{r}

plot_readCountByThreshold <- function(t_val, modeString) {
  offset_amount = 0.1
  plot_data <- long_summary %>% 
    filter(threshold == t_val)
  if(modeString != "both") {
    plot_data = plot_data %>% filter(mode == modeString)
  }
  
  max_filtered <- max(plot_data$filtered_reads, na.rm = TRUE)
  max_not_filtered <- max(plot_data$not_filtered, na.rm = TRUE)
  scale_factor <- max_filtered / max_not_filtered
  
  # Convert threshold to numeric and add offset for different point types
  plot_data <- plot_data %>%
    mutate(
      k_numeric = as.numeric(factor(k)),
      filtered_x = k_numeric - offset_amount/2,
      not_filtered_x = k_numeric + offset_amount/2
    )
  
  # Create the plot with threshold as factor but using numeric positions
  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_point(data = plot_data,
               aes(x = filtered_x, 
                   y = filtered_reads, 
                   color = "Filtered Reads", 
                   group = gene),
               size = 1.5, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_point(data = plot_data,
               aes(x = not_filtered_x, 
                   y = not_filtered * scale_factor, 
                   color = "Not Filtered Reads", 
                   group = gene),
               size = 1.5, alpha = 0.7) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      name = "Filtered Reads",
      sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . / scale_factor, 
                          name = "Not Filtered Reads", 
                          labels = scales::label_number(scale_cut = scales::cut_short_scale())),
      labels = scales::label_number(scale_cut = scales::cut_short_scale())
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = unique(plot_data$k_numeric),
      labels = unique(plot_data$k),
      name = "K"
    ) +
    labs(title = paste("Read Counts by k ( threshold =", t_val, ", mode =",modeString,")"),
         color = "Read Type") +
    theme_bw() +
    themeForSaving() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.justification = "center",
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Filtered Reads" = "#25ced1", 
                                   "Not Filtered Reads" = "#ea526f")) 
  
  if(modeString == "both"){
    p = p + facet_wrap(~mode)
  }
  
  return(p)
}


plot_readCountByThreshold(105, "both")
#savePlotReport("test.jpg", p)
```

```{r}

saveReadCounts <- function(modes = c("or", "and", "both"), plotFunc){

  for(t in unique(long_summary$threshold)) {
    for(mode in modes){
      tryCatch({

        p <- plotFunc(
          modeString = mode,
          xMetric = k,
          filter1Metric = threshold,
          filter1Value = t
        )

        pathname <- paste0(
          plotsDir,
          "ReadCount/Box/ReadCountByThreshold_T",
          t, "_", mode, "_filtered2", extType
        )

        #savePlotReport(pathname, p)
        print(p)

      }, error = function(e){

        message(
          "Failed for threshold=", t,
          " mode=", mode,
          " | Error: ", e$message
        )

      })
    }
  }

  for(k_val in unique(long_summary$k)) {
    for(mode in modes){
      tryCatch({

        p <- plotFunc(
          modeString = mode,
          xMetric = threshold,
          filter1Metric = k,
          filter1Value = k_val
        )

        pathname <- paste0(
          plotsDir,
          "ReadCount/Box/ReadCountByK_K",
          k_val, "_", mode, "_filtered2", extType
        )

        #savePlotReport(pathname, p)
        print(p)

      }, error = function(e){

        message(
          "Failed for k=", k_val,
          " mode=", mode,
          " | Error: ", e$message
        )

      })
    }
  }
}
```


```{r}

long_filtered = long_summary %>% filter(!( gene %in% excluded))
plot_readCountBoxByThreshold <- function(modeString, xMetric, filter1Metric, filter1Value) {
  
  xString = deparse(substitute(xMetric))
  filter1String = deparse(substitute(filter1Metric))
  subStr = paste(filter1String, "=", filter1Value)

  plot_data <- long_filtered %>% 
    filter({{filter1Metric}} == filter1Value)

  if (modeString != "both") {
    plot_data <- plot_data %>% filter(mode == modeString)
  }

  max_filtered <- max(plot_data$filtered_reads, na.rm = TRUE)
  max_not_filtered <- max(plot_data$not_filtered, na.rm = TRUE)
  scale_factor <- ifelse(max_not_filtered == 0, 1, max_filtered / max_not_filtered)
                       
  plot_data_long <- plot_data %>%
    tidyr::pivot_longer(
      cols = c(filtered_reads, not_filtered),
      names_to = "read_type",
      values_to = "read_count"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      read_type = dplyr::recode(
        read_type,
        filtered_reads = "Filtered Reads",
        not_filtered = "Not Filtered Reads"
      ),
      read_count = ifelse(
        read_type == "Not Filtered Reads",
        read_count * scale_factor,
        read_count
      )
    )
  
  p <- ggplot(plot_data_long,
              aes(x = factor({{xMetric}}),
                  y = read_count,
                  color = read_type,
                  fill = after_scale(scales::alpha(color, 0.4)))) +
    geom_boxplot(position = position_dodge(width = 0.75),
                 outlier.size = 1) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      name = "Filtered Reads",
      labels = scales::label_number(scale_cut = scales::cut_short_scale()),
      sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . / scale_factor,
                          name = "Not Filtered Reads",
                          labels = scales::label_number(scale_cut = scales::cut_short_scale())
                          )
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(
      "Filtered Reads" = "#2EC4B6",
      "Not Filtered Reads" = "#EA526F"
    ))  +
    labs(
      title = paste0("Read Counts by ", xString, " (", filter1String, " = ", filter1Value, ", mode = ", modeString, ")"),
      x = xString,
      fill = "Read Type"
    ) +
    themeForSaving() +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.justification = "center",
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    ) 

  if (modeString == "both") {
    p <- p + facet_wrap(~mode)
  }

  return(p)
}
long_filtered %>% filter(k == 15) %>% arrange(desc(not_filtered)) %>% select(k, offset, threshold, mode, gene, not_filtered)
```

```{r}
for(value in c("not_filtered", "filtered_reads")){
  df = long_filtered %>%
  filter(k == 15) %>%
  group_by(mode, threshold) %>%
  summarise(
      Q1 = quantile(.data[[value]], 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
      Median = quantile(.data[[value]], 0.50, na.rm = TRUE),
      Q3 = quantile(.data[[value]], 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
      variable = value,
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  print(df)
}


plot_readCountBoxByThreshold("both", threshold, k, 15)
#saveReadCounts(plotFunc = plot_readCountBoxByThreshold, modes = c("both"))
 
long_filtered %>%
  filter(k == 15 & mode == "or") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(threshold), y = not_filtered, group = threshold)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0,50))

long_filtered %>%
  select(threshold, k, offset, gene, mode, not_filtered) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = mode,
    values_from = not_filtered
  ) %>%
  mutate(diff = and - or) %>%
  group_by(threshold, k, offset) %>%
  summarise(mean_diff = mean(diff, na.rm = TRUE),
            max_diff = max(diff, na.rm = T),
            .groups = "drop")  %>% #filter(k == 15)
  arrange(desc(max_diff))
```


```{r}
tsv = read_tsv(paste0(gridsearchDir, "k_17/offset_17/threshold_90/mode_and/read2gene_matrix.tsv"))
tsv %>% pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("E")) %>% group_by(name) %>% summarise(sum(value))

tsv %>% mutate(rowsum = rowSums(.[2:9])) %>% summarise(avg = mean(rowsum))
```


```{r}
#saveReadCountsByThreshold( c("both"))
#saveReadCountsByThreshold()

fullGenes = read_tsv(paste0(allGenesDir, "dna_gene_counts.tsv"))
fullRNA = read_tsv(paste0(allGenesDir, "gene_counts.tsv"))
parameterString="K=15, T=105"
```

```{r}

plotCountDistribution <- function(df, colour, typeString){
  p = df %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = count +1)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 100, fill = colour) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(scale_cut = scales::cut_short_scale()))+
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(scale_cut = scales::cut_short_scale())) +
  labs(title = paste(typeString, "Count Distribution"),
       subtitle = paste0("(", parameterString, ")")) +
  theme_minimal()
  return(p)
}
```

```{r}
p = plotCountDistribution(fullGenes, "deepskyblue4", "Gene")
savePlotReport(paste0(plotsDir, "geneCounts_cont2", extType), p)
p = plotCountDistribution(fullRNA, "deepskyblue3", "Transcript")
savePlotReport(paste0(plotsDir, "TranscriptCounts_cont2", extType), p)

```



```{r}


```

```{r}
sampleGenes %>% select(gene) %>% write.table("../output/gene_list.txt",
              row.names = FALSE,
              col.names = FALSE,
              quote = FALSE)

readcounts %>% write_tsv(file = "../output/read_counts.tsv")


```

### scatter plot tradeoff (filter vs matched)

```{r}
readTotalSummary <- function(ext = ""){
  df = read_tsv(paste0(gridsearchDir, "totalCountSummary3", ext, ".tsv")) %>% mutate(nFastqReads = numReads,
                                                                                  matched = totalFiltered - filtered_not_mapped)
  return(df)
}
getMappingReads<- function(gene_id, df = long_summary){
  return(df %>% filter(gene == gene_id) %>% summarise(x = min(mapping_reads)) %>% pull(x))
}

totalCounts = readTotalSummary()
totalCounts_no18 = readTotalSummary(paste0("_excluding_", excluded)) %>% mutate(totalMapped = totalMapped - getMappingReads(excluded))


long_summary %>% filter(gene == excluded)

totalCounts %>% anti_join(totalCounts_no18)
```

```{r}
totalCounts %>% mutate(filteredFraction = totalFiltered / nFastqReads, mappingRate = matched/totalMapped) %>% arrange(desc(mappingRate))
```

```{r}
barPlotMappingRate <- function(val, metric, xFactor, df = totalCounts){
  metricString = deparse(substitute(metric))
  xString = deparse(substitute(xFactor))
  
  p = df %>% filter({{metric}} == val) %>%
  mutate(mappingRate = matched/totalMapped) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = factor({{xFactor}}), y = mappingRate, fill = mode)) +
    geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  themeForSaving() +
  theme(legend.position = "right", legend.justification = "center") +
  labs(title = paste("Mapping Rate per mode and", xString),
       subtitle = paste("at", metricString, "=", val),
       x = xString,
       y = "matched/mapped") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0,1))
  return(p)
}

#barPlotMappingRate(12, k, threshold)

saveMappingRates <- function(df = totalCounts, captionStr = ""){
  for(k_val in unique(df$k)){
    p = barPlotMappingRate(k_val, k, threshold, df) + labs(caption = captionStr)
    savePlotReport(paste0(plotsDir, "bars2/K/mappingrate_K", k_val, captionStr ,extType), p)
  }
  for(t_val in unique(df$threshold)){
    p = barPlotMappingRate(t_val, threshold, k, df) + labs(caption = captionStr) 
    savePlotReport(paste0(plotsDir, "bars2/T/mappingrate_T", t_val, captionStr ,extType), p)

    
  }
}

long_summary %>% filter(gene == excluded)
```



```{r}
saveMappingRates(totalCounts_no18, captionStr = paste0("No_", excluded))
```

```{r}
saveMappingRates()
```


```{r}


plotScatterTradeOff <- function(modeString){
  p = totalCounts_no18 %>%  filter(mode == modeString) %>% 
  mutate(mappingRate = matched/totalMapped,
         filteredRate = totalFiltered/nFastqReads) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = mappingRate, y = filteredRate)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = factor(threshold), color = factor(k)), size = 2.5, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs( x = "matched/mapped", y = "filtered/all") +
  themeForSaving() +
  theme(legend.position = "right", legend.justification = "center") +
  labs(title = "Mappingrate vs Filterrate tradeoff",
       subtitle = paste("Mode:", modeString)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0,1), ylim = c(0,0.07))
  
  return(p)
}

for(mode in c("or", "and")){
  p = plotScatterTradeOff(mode)
  savePlotReport(paste0(plotsDir, "scatter3/mapping_filter_", mode, "_no18",extType), p)
  print(p)
}

p = plotScatterTradeOff("or")
```

```{r}
plotRecallPrecision <- function(modeString){
  totalCounts %>% 
  filter(mode == modeString) %>% 
  mutate(recall = matched/totalMapped,
                       precision = matched/totalFiltered) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = recall, y=precision)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = factor(threshold), color = factor(k)), size = 2.5, alpha = 0.7) +
  themeForSaving() +
  theme(legend.position = "right", legend.justification = "center") +
  labs(title = "Precision vs Recall",
       subtitle = paste("Mode:", modeString)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0,1), ylim=c(0,1))
}

for(mode in c("or", "and")){
  p = plotRecallPrecision(mode)
  savePlotReport(paste0(plotsDir, "precision_recall/precision_recall_", mode, extType), p)
  #l = get_legend(p)
  #ggsave(paste0(gridsearchDir, "precision_recall_legend_bottom", extType), l)
}



## and more precision, or more recall -> we want to increse recall to 1
```
